  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W X Y Z 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    addSpawn(EnemySpawn) - Method in class logic.Wave
    Adds a new spawning sequence to the current wave.
    addWaypoint(Waypoint) - Method in class path.EnemyPath
    Appends a new waypoint to the end of the existing path sequence.
    AOETower - Class in tower
    An abstract specialization of Tower designed for Area of Effect (AoE) attacks.
    AOETower(double, double, double, double, int) - Constructor for class tower.AOETower
    Constructs an AOETower with specific AoE attributes.
    applySlow(double, double) - Method in class enemy.Enemy
    Applies a movement slowing effect for a specific duration.
    attackBase(double) - Method in class enemy.Boss
    Executes a repeated attack cycle against the player's base.

    B

    Bat - Class in enemy
    The Bat class represents a concrete implementation of an aerial enemy unit.
    Bat(EnemyPath, int, int, double) - Constructor for class enemy.Bat
    Constructs a Bat instance and assigns its specific visual assets.
    Bomber - Class in enemy
    The Bomber class is a specialized enemy unit that triggers a tactical effect upon its destruction.
    Bomber(EnemyPath, int, int, double) - Constructor for class enemy.Bomber
    Constructs a Bomber instance and initializes its visual representation.
    Boss - Class in enemy
    The Boss class represents a high-priority hostile unit with unique behavior upon reaching the player's base.
    Boss(EnemyPath, int, int, double) - Constructor for class enemy.Boss
    Constructs a Boss instance and assigns its specific visual assets.
    Bullet - Class in bullets
    The Bullet class serves as the fundamental projectile entity in the game system.
    Bullet(double, double, Enemy, double, int) - Constructor for class bullets.Bullet
    Initializes a new Bullet instance with specified starting coordinates, a target entity, and combat statistics.
    bulletDamage - Variable in class tower.Tower
    The amount of health reduction applied by this tower's projectiles.
    bullets - package bullets
    Projectile System Package * This package implements the core mechanics for all projectile entities within the game.
    bulletSpeed - Variable in class tower.Tower
    The velocity of projectiles fired by this tower.

    C

    canPlace(double, double) - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Validates whether a tower can be placed at the specified coordinates.
    card - package card
    Card System and Summoning Framework * This package defines the core infrastructure for the card-based mechanics within the game.
    Card - Class in card
    The Card class serves as an abstract blueprint for all playable cards within the game.
    Card() - Constructor for class card.Card
    Default constructor for initializing a new card instance.
    CardBar - Class in view
    The CardBar class represents the interactive toolbar for selecting towers or spells within the game's interface.
    CardBar() - Constructor for class view.CardBar
    Constructs a new CardBar with a predefined aesthetic and layout configuration.
    CardView - Class in view
    Represents the visual representation of a single collectible item, such as a Tower or a Spell.
    CardView(Card, Consumer<Card>) - Constructor for class view.CardView
    Constructs a CardView with dynamic content based on the provided card type.
    cast(double, double) - Method in class spell.FireBall
    Executes the fireball logic at the target location.
    cast(double, double) - Method in class spell.FrostBite
    Executes the frost logic at the target location.
    cast(double, double) - Method in class spell.HealingBase
    Executes the healing logic to restore base health points.
    cast(double, double) - Method in class spell.Spell
    Executes the spell's unique logic at the specified spatial coordinates.
    cast(double, double) - Method in class spell.XSnap
    Executes the cinematic ultimate ability sequence.
    CIRCLE - Enum constant in enum class view.VisualShape
    Represents a circular geometry, often used for standard projectiles or area-of-effect (AoE) indicators.
    color - Variable in class logic.EnemySpawn
     
    cooldown - Variable in class tower.Tower
    The time interval (in seconds) required between consecutive shots.
    createView(Enemy, EnemySpawn) - Static method in class view.EnemyViewFactory
    Creates and returns a new EnemyView configured for the given enemy.

    D

    damage - Variable in class bullets.Bullet
     
    damage - Variable in class card.Card
    The base offensive power or damage dealt by the summoned entity.
    damage - Variable in class spell.Spell
    The primary magnitude of the spell's effect, often representing health reduction.
    damageBase(int) - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Reduces the player's base health and triggers feedback effects.
    die() - Method in class enemy.Bomber
    Overrides the death logic to implement an "On Death" explosion effect.
    die() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
    Sets the enemy state to inactive and stops all updates.
    draw(GraphicsContext) - Method in class bullets.Bullet
    Handles the graphical rendering of the projectile on the game canvas.
    draw(GraphicsContext) - Method in class bullets.IceBullet
    Overrides the visual representation of the projectile.
    drawGas(GraphicsContext) - Method in class tower.AOETower
    Renders the AoE gas effect onto the game canvas.
    drawGas(GraphicsContext) - Method in class tower.MistTower
    Renders a specialized "Freezing Mist" visual effect.
    drawGas(GraphicsContext) - Method in class tower.PlasmaTower
    Renders a specialized "Plasma Pulse" visual effect.
    drawGas(GraphicsContext) - Method in class tower.TornadoTower
    Renders a specialized "Vortex Pulse" visual effect.

    E

    enemy - package enemy
    Enemy and Path-finding Logic System This package contains the core classes responsible for enemy behavior, movement, and state management.
    Enemy - Class in enemy
    The Enemy class serves as the base entity for all hostile units in the game.
    Enemy(EnemyPath, int, int, double) - Constructor for class enemy.Enemy
    Constructs a new Enemy with a specific path and base statistics.
    EnemyPath - Class in path
    The EnemyPath class defines the navigational route for enemy entities and manages spatial path-validation logic.
    EnemyPath(List<Waypoint>) - Constructor for class path.EnemyPath
    Constructs an EnemyPath with a predefined list of waypoints.
    EnemySpawn - Class in logic
    The EnemySpawn class manages the logic for instantiating a specific group of enemies.
    EnemySpawn(GameLogic, Supplier<Enemy>, double, int, double, double, Color, VisualShape) - Constructor for class logic.EnemySpawn
    Constructs an EnemySpawn controller with precise spawning parameters and visual data.
    EnemyView - Class in view
    Provides the graphical representation and real-time status tracking for enemy entities.
    EnemyView(Enemy, double) - Constructor for class view.EnemyView
    Constructs an EnemyView and initializes its visual components.
    EnemyViewFactory - Class in view
    The EnemyViewFactory class provides a centralized mechanism for creating EnemyView instances based on the specific type of enemy.

    F

    findTarget(List<Enemy>) - Method in class tower.AOETower
    Identifies all valid enemies within the tower's range.
    findTarget(List<Enemy>) - Method in class tower.GlacierTower
    Identifies the optimal target within its vast engagement radius.
    findTarget(List<Enemy>) - Method in class tower.RangeTower
    Overrides the targeting logic to remove type restrictions.
    findTarget(List<Enemy>) - Method in class tower.TeslaTower
    Identifies the optimal target using advanced long-range logic.
    findTarget(List<Enemy>) - Method in class tower.TornadoTower
    Identifies all valid enemies within the expanded atmospheric zone.
    findTarget(List<Enemy>) - Method in class tower.Tower
    Logic for selecting the most appropriate enemy to attack.
    FireBall - Class in spell
    Represents a concrete implementation of a fire-based offensive spell.
    FireBall(List<Enemy>, Pane) - Constructor for class spell.FireBall
    Constructs a FireBall spell with specific damage, range, and environmental references.
    FlyingEnemy - Class in enemy
    The FlyingEnemy class represents a specialized type of enemy unit capable of aerial movement.
    FlyingEnemy(EnemyPath, int, int, double) - Constructor for class enemy.FlyingEnemy
    Constructs a new FlyingEnemy by invoking the superclass constructor.
    FrostBite - Class in spell
    Represents a crowd-control spell that inflicts a significant slow effect on enemies.
    FrostBite(List<Enemy>, Pane) - Constructor for class spell.FrostBite
    Constructs a FrostBite spell with a large range and a specialized slow attribute.

    G

    GAME_OVER - Enum constant in enum class logic.GameState
    Indicates that the game has concluded, typically due to the player's base health reaching zero.
    GameLogic - Class in logic
    The GameLogic class serves as the central controller and engine for the game.
    GameLogic(Pane, Runnable) - Constructor for class logic.GameLogic
    principal constructor for GameLogic that initializes the entire game engine.
    GameState - Enum Class in logic
    The GameState enum defines the primary operational states of the game application.
    GAS_FADE_TIME - Static variable in class tower.AOETower
    Duration threshold after which the gas begins to fade away.
    gasActive - Variable in class tower.AOETower
    State flag indicating if the AoE effect is currently being animated.
    gasExpandSpeed - Variable in class tower.AOETower
    The speed at which the gas expands per frame.
    gasExpandTime - Variable in class tower.AOETower
    Tracks how long the gas has been expanding.
    gasOpacity - Variable in class tower.AOETower
    Transparency level of the gas effect for visual fading.
    gasRadius - Variable in class tower.AOETower
    Current radius of the expanding gas effect.
    GasTower - Class in tower
    Represents a specific implementation of an AOETower that utilizes toxic gas to damage enemies.
    GasTower(double, double) - Constructor for class tower.GasTower
    Constructs a GasTower with predefined stats: - Range: 75 units - Cooldown: 1.5 seconds - Damage: 10 per tick
    getArmor() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    getArmor() - Method in class enemy.Orc
    Retrieves the current armor durability.
    getBaseHP() - Method in class logic.GameLogic
     
    getBaseSpeed() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    getBulletDamage() - Method in class tower.Tower
     
    getBullets() - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Retrieves the current list of active projectiles in the game.
    getBulletSpeed() - Method in class tower.Tower
     
    getCard() - Method in class view.CardView
    Retrieves the card data model associated with this view.
    getCooldown() - Method in class tower.Tower
     
    getDamage() - Method in class bullets.Bullet
     
    getDamage() - Method in class card.Card
     
    getDamage() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    getDamage() - Method in class spell.Spell
     
    getEnemies() - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Returns the global list of active enemies currently in the simulation.
    getEnemy() - Method in class view.EnemyView
     
    getEnemyPath() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    getFusionResult(Tower) - Method in interface Interface.Mergeable
    Determines and returns the resulting tower produced by merging this entity with another compatible unit.
    getFusionResult(Tower) - Method in class tower.GasTower
    Determines the resulting advanced tower when this GasTower is merged with another tower.
    getFusionResult(Tower) - Method in class tower.IceTower
    Defines the fusion recipes when an IceTower is combined with other elemental types.
    getFusionResult(Tower) - Method in class tower.RangeTower
    Defines the fusion outcomes when a RangeTower is combined with elemental components.
    getFusionResult(Tower) - Method in class tower.ZapTower
    Defines the electrical fusion recipes when combined with other elemental towers.
    getHp() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    getImagePath() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    getImagePath() - Method in class tower.Tower
     
    getIndex() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    getInstance() - Static method in class logic.GameLogic
    Provides a global access point to the GameLogic instance.
    getMaxHp() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    getMouseX() - Static method in class input.Input
     
    getMouseY() - Static method in class input.Input
     
    getName() - Method in class card.Card
     
    getName() - Method in class spell.Spell
     
    getName() - Method in class tower.Tower
     
    getPlaceSoundPath() - Method in class tower.Tower
     
    getPosition() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    getPosition() - Method in class path.Waypoint
    Retrieves the position of this waypoint as a Point2D object.
    getPosition() - Method in class tower.Tower
     
    getRange() - Method in class card.Card
     
    getRange() - Method in class spell.Spell
     
    getRange() - Method in class tower.Tower
     
    getSelectedCard() - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Retrieves the currently active card selected by the player from the UI.
    getSpa() - Method in class card.Card
     
    getSpecial() - Method in class card.Card
     
    getSpecial() - Method in class spell.Spell
     
    getTarget() - Method in class bullets.Bullet
     
    getTower() - Method in class view.TowerView
     
    getTowers() - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Returns the global list of towers currently deployed on the battlefield.
    getWaypoint(int) - Method in class path.EnemyPath
    Retrieves a specific waypoint based on its index in the sequence.
    getWaypoints() - Method in class path.EnemyPath
    Retrieves the entire list of waypoints defining the path.
    getX() - Method in class bullets.Bullet
     
    getX() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    getX() - Method in class path.Waypoint
    Helper method to retrieve the X-coordinate directly.
    getX() - Method in class tower.Tower
     
    getY() - Method in class bullets.Bullet
     
    getY() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    getY() - Method in class path.Waypoint
    Helper method to retrieve the Y-coordinate directly.
    getY() - Method in class tower.Tower
     
    GlacierTower - Class in tower
    An advanced fusion tower that combines superior range with cryogenic status effects.
    GlacierTower(double, double) - Constructor for class tower.GlacierTower
    Constructs a GlacierTower with elite-tier statistics: - Range: 400 units (Extreme range) - Cooldown: 1.8 seconds (Slow fire rate, balanced by high impact) - Damage: 25 (High single-target damage)

    H

    hasArmor() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    hasArmor() - Method in class enemy.Orc
    Checks if the armor layer is still functional.
    hasHit - Variable in class bullets.Bullet
     
    hasHit() - Method in class bullets.Bullet
    Checks if the projectile lifecycle has concluded.
    hasReachedEnd() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    HealingBase - Class in spell
    Represents a supportive utility spell designed to restore the player's base health.
    HealingBase(GameLogic, Pane) - Constructor for class spell.HealingBase
    Constructs a HealingBase spell that references the central game logic.
    HEIGHT - Static variable in class main.Main
     
    HEXAGON - Enum constant in enum class view.VisualShape
     

    I

    IceBullet - Class in bullets
    IceBullet is a specialized subclass of the Bullet class that implements a movement-speed reduction effect (slow debuff) upon impact.
    IceBullet(double, double, Enemy, double, int) - Constructor for class bullets.IceBullet
    Constructs an IceBullet by invoking the superclass constructor.
    IceTower - Class in tower
    A specialized Tower that focuses on crowd control by firing ice-based projectiles.
    IceTower(double, double) - Constructor for class tower.IceTower
    Constructs an IceTower with predefined crowd-control statistics: - Range: 150 units (Mid-range) - Cooldown: 1.0 second - Damage: 5 (Low damage, compensated by utility) - Bullet Speed: 200 units/sec
    imagePath - Variable in class enemy.Enemy
     
    imagePath - Variable in class tower.Tower
    Resource path for the tower's visual sprite.
    input - package input
    Input Management and Event Handling System This package provides a centralized utility for processing keyboard and mouse events within the JavaFX environment.
    Input - Class in input
    The Input class acts as a global manager for keyboard and mouse states.
    Input() - Constructor for class input.Input
     
    Interface - package Interface
    Game Interfaces and Behavior Contracts This package defines the core interfaces and behavioral contracts that govern the interactions between different game entities.
    isAlive() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    isFinished() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    isFinished() - Method in class logic.EnemySpawn
    Determines if the spawner has reached its full capacity and finished its operation.
    isFinished() - Method in class logic.Wave
    Evaluates whether the wave has concluded all spawning activities.
    isLeftClick() - Static method in class input.Input
     
    isOnPath(double, double) - Method in class path.EnemyPath
    Checks if a specific coordinate (x, y) is within a defined proximity to the path.
    isPressed(KeyCode) - Static method in class input.Input
    Checks if a specific key was pressed during the current frame.
    isRightClick() - Static method in class input.Input
     
    isSlowed() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     

    L

    length() - Method in class path.EnemyPath
    Returns the total number of waypoints in the path.
    logic - package logic
    Game Logic and State Management * This package contains the core engine logic responsible for managing the game's internal state, including wave progression, entity spawning, and combat coordination.

    M

    main - package main
    Provides the core bootstrap and view management for the application.
    Main - Class in main
    The Main class serves as the central orchestrator and entry point for the JavaFX application.
    Main() - Constructor for class main.Main
     
    maxGasRadius - Variable in class tower.AOETower
    The maximum size the gas effect can reach, typically equal to the tower's range.
    Mergeable - Interface in Interface
    The Mergeable interface defines a contract for entities that can be combined to create a more advanced or specialized unit.
    MistTower - Class in tower
    An advanced fusion tower that combines Area-of-Effect (AoE) damage with debilitating cold effects.
    MistTower(double, double) - Constructor for class tower.MistTower
    Constructs a MistTower with specialized hybrid statistics: - Range: 75 units (Focused AoE radius) - Cooldown: 1.5 seconds - Damage: 10 per pulse

    N

    name - Variable in class card.Card
    The display name used to identify the card in the user interface.
    name - Variable in class spell.Spell
    The display name of the spell.
    name - Variable in class tower.Tower
    The display name of the tower.
    notInRange(Enemy) - Method in class tower.Tower
    Calculates the Euclidean distance to determine if an enemy is outside the attack radius.

    O

    onKeyPressed(KeyEvent) - Static method in class input.Input
    Processes key press events and updates internal state buffers.
    onKeyReleased(KeyEvent) - Static method in class input.Input
    Processes key release events and removes them from the active set.
    onMousePressed(MouseButton) - Static method in class input.Input
    Processes mouse button press events.
    onMouseReleased(MouseButton) - Static method in class input.Input
    Processes mouse button release events and resets button state.
    onReachEnd() - Method in class enemy.Boss
    Overrides the end-of-path logic to prevent the Boss from being removed.
    onReachEnd() - Method in class enemy.Enemy
    Logic executed when the enemy successfully completes its path.
    Orc - Class in enemy
    The Orc class represents a heavily armored enemy unit.
    Orc(EnemyPath, int, int, double) - Constructor for class enemy.Orc
    Constructs an Orc instance with health-proportional armor.

    P

    path - package path
    Provides the spatial infrastructure and geometric logic for entity navigation.
    PathView - Class in view
    Provides the visual rendering of the enemy navigational route on the game map.
    PathView(EnemyPath) - Constructor for class view.PathView
    Constructs a PathView based on the provided logical path coordinates.
    pauseGame() - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Suspends the game logic updates.
    placeSoundPath - Variable in class tower.Tower
    Resource path for the sound effect played when the tower is placed.
    PlasmaTower - Class in tower
    An elite fusion tower that combines Area-of-Effect (AoE) capabilities with high-frequency attacks.
    PlasmaTower(double, double) - Constructor for class tower.PlasmaTower
    Constructs a PlasmaTower with high-performance combat statistics: - Range: 75 units (Focused AoE radius) - Cooldown: 0.7 seconds (Very fast for an AoE tower) - Damage: 10 per energy pulse
    PLAYING - Enum constant in enum class logic.GameState
    Indicates that the game is currently in progress.

    R

    range - Variable in class card.Card
    The operational radius or maximum distance the summoned entity can reach.
    range - Variable in class spell.Spell
    The radius or reach within which the spell's effect is active.
    range - Variable in class tower.Tower
    The circular radius within which the tower can detect and engage enemies.
    RangeTower - Class in tower
    A specialized Tower characterized by its superior engagement distance and versatile targeting.
    RangeTower(double, double) - Constructor for class tower.RangeTower
    Constructs a RangeTower with high-distance combat statistics: - Range: 250 units (Long-range) - Cooldown: 1.0 second - Damage: 10 - Bullet Speed: 250 units/sec (Fast projectiles)
    reset() - Static method in class input.Input
    Resets all key buffers, typically used when changing scenes or focus.
    resetGame() - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Restores the game engine to its initial state for a new session.
    resumeGame() - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Resumes the game logic updates from the current state.

    S

    setBaseHP(int) - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Updates the base health to a specific value.
    setBaseSpeed(double) - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    setBulletSpeed(double) - Method in class tower.Tower
     
    setCurrentSpeed(double) - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    setDamage(int) - Method in class bullets.Bullet
     
    setDamage(int) - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    setHp(int) - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    setImagePath(String) - Method in class tower.Tower
     
    setIndex(int) - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    setMousePosition(double, double) - Static method in class input.Input
    Updates the global mouse coordinates.
    setPosition(double, double) - Method in class tower.Tower
    Updates the tower's location on the game map.
    setPosition(Point2D) - Method in class enemy.Enemy
     
    setPosition(Point2D) - Method in class path.Waypoint
    Updates the position of this waypoint.
    setSelected(boolean) - Method in class view.CardView
    Updates the visual state of the card to indicate whether it is currently selected.
    shape - Variable in class logic.EnemySpawn
     
    shoot(Enemy, List<Bullet>) - Method in class tower.AOETower
    Applies instantaneous damage to the specified target.
    shoot(Enemy, List<Bullet>) - Method in class tower.GlacierTower
    Fires a high-velocity IceBullet at the selected target.
    shoot(Enemy, List<Bullet>) - Method in class tower.IceTower
    Fires an IceBullet toward the specified target.
    shoot(Enemy, List<Bullet>) - Method in class tower.MistTower
    Applies both damage and a cryogenic status effect to the target.
    shoot(Enemy, List<Bullet>) - Method in class tower.RangeTower
    Fires a standard Bullet toward the identified target.
    shoot(Enemy, List<Bullet>) - Method in class tower.SuperconductTower
    Fires a high-frequency IceBullet at the selected target.
    shoot(Enemy, List<Bullet>) - Method in class tower.TeslaTower
    Dispatches a high-velocity Bullet toward the targeted enemy.
    shoot(Enemy, List<Bullet>) - Method in class tower.Tower
    Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses to define projectile behavior.
    shoot(Enemy, List<Bullet>) - Method in class tower.ZapTower
    Fires a standard Bullet toward the targeted enemy.
    shootGas() - Method in class tower.AOETower
    Triggers the visual expansion of the gas effect.
    showStunEffect(Point2D, double, double) - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Renders a visual feedback animation for the stun area-of-effect (AOE).
    size - Variable in class logic.EnemySpawn
     
    SIZE - Static variable in class bullets.Bullet
     
    Skeleton - Class in enemy
    The Skeleton class represents a standard ground-based enemy unit.
    Skeleton(EnemyPath, int, int, double) - Constructor for class enemy.Skeleton
    Constructs a Skeleton instance and assigns its specific visual assets.
    spa - Variable in class card.Card
    Speed Per Attack (SPA).
    spawnEnemy(Enemy, EnemySpawn) - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Instantiates an enemy unit and attaches it to the game world.
    spawnTower(Tower, String, double) - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Registers a new tower into the game engine and initializes its visual component.
    special - Variable in class card.Card
    A descriptive text detailing the card's unique abilities or special traits.
    special - Variable in class spell.Spell
    A description or identifier for unique attributes of the spell (e.g., "Slow", "Heal").
    speed - Variable in class bullets.Bullet
     
    spell - package spell
    Provides the framework and concrete implementations for the game's active ability system.
    Spell - Class in spell
    The Spell class serves as the abstract base for all magical abilities in the game.
    Spell() - Constructor for class spell.Spell
     
    SpellCard - Class in card
    The SpellCard class is a concrete implementation of the Card template specifically designed for spell-based actions.
    SpellCard(Supplier<Spell>) - Constructor for class card.SpellCard
    Constructs a SpellCard by extracting attributes from a provided Spell factory.
    SQUARE - Enum constant in enum class view.VisualShape
     
    start(Stage) - Method in class main.Main
    The primary entry point for the JavaFX application.
    startGame() - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Initiates the game by starting the animation timer and activating wave logic.
    stopGame() - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Terminate the game session and performs a complete resource cleanup.
    stun(double) - Method in class tower.Tower
    Disables the tower for a specified duration.
    stunNearbyTowers(Point2D, double, double) - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Applies a stun status effect to towers within a specific circular area.
    stunned - Variable in class tower.Tower
    State flag indicating if the tower is currently disabled.
    stunTimer - Variable in class tower.Tower
    Internal counter for the duration of a stun effect.
    summon() - Method in class card.Card
    Triggers the summoning mechanism defined for this card.
    summon() - Method in class card.SpellCard
    Executes the summoning process by invoking the spell factory.
    summon() - Method in class card.TowerCard
    Executes the summoning process for a defensive tower.
    summonFactory - Variable in class card.Card
    The factory object responsible for instantiating the game entity associated with this card.
    SuperconductTower - Class in tower
    An advanced fusion tower that combines rapid-fire electrical frequency with cryogenic effects.
    SuperconductTower(double, double) - Constructor for class tower.SuperconductTower
    Constructs a SuperconductTower with optimized utility statistics: - Range: 180 units (Enhanced coverage) - Cooldown: 0.4 seconds (The fastest slowing tower in the game) - Damage: 10 per projectile
    sync() - Method in class view.EnemyView
    Synchronizes the view's properties with the current state of the enemy model.

    T

    takeDamage(int) - Method in class enemy.Enemy
    Reduces health points and triggers death logic if health reaches zero.
    takeDamage(int) - Method in class enemy.Orc
    Overrides the damage processing logic to implement the armor system.
    target - Variable in class bullets.Bullet
     
    TeslaTower - Class in tower
    An elite fusion tower that combines exceptional engagement range with extreme firing velocity.
    TeslaTower(double, double) - Constructor for class tower.TeslaTower
    Constructs a TeslaTower with peak performance statistics: - Range: 250 units (Long-range coverage) - Cooldown: 0.3 seconds (The fastest attack speed in the game) - Damage: 15 (High single-target DPS) - Bullet Speed: 300 units/sec (Ultra-fast projectiles to match range)
    timer - Variable in class tower.Tower
    Internal counter to track elapsed time for the cooldown cycle.
    TornadoTower - Class in tower
    An advanced fusion tower that combines Area-of-Effect (AoE) damage with expanded environmental reach.
    TornadoTower(double, double) - Constructor for class tower.TornadoTower
    Constructs a TornadoTower with enhanced territorial control statistics: - Range: 150 units (Double the radius of a standard Gas Tower) - Cooldown: 1.5 seconds - Damage: 10 per atmospheric pulse
    tower - package tower
    Provides the core logic and specialized implementations for defensive structures.
    Tower - Class in tower
    Represents the skeletal implementation of a defensive structure within the game.
    Tower(double, double, double, double, int) - Constructor for class tower.Tower
    Constructs a Tower with fundamental combat statistics.
    TowerCard - Class in card
    The TowerCard class is a concrete implementation of the Card template specifically designed for managing and summoning defensive structures.
    TowerCard(Supplier<Tower>) - Constructor for class card.TowerCard
    Constructs a TowerCard by mapping tower-specific statistics to the shared attributes inherited from the Card base class.
    TowerView - Class in view
    The TowerView class provides the graphical representation for a specific tower instance.
    TowerView(Tower, String, double) - Constructor for class view.TowerView
    Constructs a new TowerView and initializes its visual sprite.
    travelDistance - Variable in class bullets.Bullet
     
    TRIANGLE - Enum constant in enum class view.VisualShape
     

    U

    update() - Static method in class input.Input
    Clears the discrete event buffers (pressed/released states).
    update(double) - Method in class bullets.Bullet
    Updates the projectile logic for each frame.
    update(double) - Method in class bullets.IceBullet
    Overrides the update logic to include specialized combat effects.
    update(double) - Method in class enemy.Boss
    Updates the Boss state, prioritizing movement until the destination is reached.
    update(double) - Method in class enemy.Enemy
    Updates the enemy's state for each frame.
    update(double) - Method in class logic.EnemySpawn
    Updates the spawning timer and executes instantiation if conditions are met.
    update(double) - Method in class logic.Wave
    Updates the state of all spawning sequences based on elapsed game time.
    update(double, List<Enemy>, List<Bullet>) - Method in class tower.AOETower
    Updates the tower logic and the state of its active AoE effects.
    update(double, List<Enemy>, List<Bullet>) - Method in class tower.Tower
    Updates the tower's state during each game tick.
    updateBullets(double) - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Updates the trajectory of all active projectiles and removes those that have collided.
    updateEnemies(double) - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Manages the behavior, health checks, and goal-reaching logic for all enemies.
    updateGasEffect(double) - Method in class tower.AOETower
    Manages the animation properties of the gas effect.
    updateInput() - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Processes user interactions for gameplay actions such as selection, placement, and fusion.
    updateTowers(double, List<Enemy>) - Method in class logic.GameLogic
    Updates the logic for all active towers on the field.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class logic.GameState
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class view.VisualShape
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class logic.GameState
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class view.VisualShape
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    view - package view
    Provides the graphical user interface (GUI) components and visual rendering systems.
    VisualShape - Enum Class in view
    Defines the set of primitive geometric shapes used for visual identification of game entities.

    W

    Wave - Class in logic
    The Wave class manages a collection of enemy spawn events for a specific game round.
    Wave() - Constructor for class logic.Wave
     
    Waypoint - Class in path
    Represents a specific spatial coordinate on the game map used to define enemy navigation paths.
    Waypoint(double, double) - Constructor for class path.Waypoint
    Constructs a new Waypoint at the specified X and Y coordinates.
    WIDTH - Static variable in class main.Main
     

    X

    x - Variable in class bullets.Bullet
     
    x - Variable in class tower.Tower
    The spatial coordinates of the tower on the game map.
    XSnap - Class in spell
    Represents the ultimate "X Snap" spell, a high-impact ability that triggers a cinematic sequence and deals massive damage to all active enemies.
    XSnap(List<Enemy>, Pane, Runnable, Runnable) - Constructor for class spell.XSnap
    Constructs the XSnap spell and initializes the cinematic frame cache.

    Y

    y - Variable in class bullets.Bullet
     
    y - Variable in class tower.Tower
    The spatial coordinates of the tower on the game map.

    Z

    ZapTower - Class in tower
    A specialized Tower designed for high-frequency electrical attacks.
    ZapTower(double, double) - Constructor for class tower.ZapTower
    Constructs a ZapTower with rapid-response statistics: - Range: 150 units - Cooldown: 0.5 seconds (The fastest among basic towers) - Damage: 7 - Bullet Speed: 200 units/sec
